summary: Classified the 10 live inventory PRs independently as requested. No shared canonical was selected. Seven non-security PRs should stay open for proof, author follow-up, or maintainer technical review; #51683, #88997, and #89526 are routed only to central security triage after deterministic validation required security routing for #51683 and #88997 and the hydrated artifact already marked #89526 security-sensitive. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening actions are planned because the job disables those paths.
